decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ surging 1.9% and S&P 500 up 1.1%, confirming growth and tech momentum. I'm deploying most of the remaining $577 cash across three high-conviction screener picks — CBRS, SOFI, and PL — all showing MACD bullish crossovers with RSI in the 55–70 optimal range. Existing holdings are left intact; none are signaling deterioration and the portfolio is up 32.6% overall.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly today, with the NASDAQ outpacing the broader S&P 500 as investors rotated back into growth and technology stocks. The risk-on tone was driven by easing macro concerns, with traders pricing in a more favorable rate environment heading into the second half of 2026. Small- and mid-cap growth names led the charge, consistent with a 'risk appetite' expansion where investors move up the risk curve from defensives into higher-beta equities.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面走高，納斯達克指數漲幅達1.9%，領先大盤標普500指數的1.1%升幅，顯示資金重新流入成長股與科技板塊。市場整體呈現「風險偏好」（risk-on）情緒，投資者預期宏觀環境將於2026年下半年趨於寬鬆，紛紛從防禦性資產轉向高貝塔成長標的。中小型成長股表現突出，反映市場對景氣復甦的信心正在升溫。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on describes a market environment where investors feel confident and move money into higher-risk, higher-reward assets like growth stocks, small-caps, and emerging markets. Today's NASDAQ +1.9% vs S&P 500 +1.1% split is a classic risk-on signal — when investors are optimistic, they favor volatile tech over defensive large-caps. The opposite, risk-off, sends money into bonds, gold, and dividend stocks as a safe haven.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指投資者情緒樂觀、願意承擔更高風險以換取更高回報的市場狀態，資金會流向成長股、小型股等高波動資產。今日納斯達克漲幅（+1.9%）明顯高於標普500（+1.1%），正是典型的風險偏好訊號——市場看好前景時，資金傾向科技成長股而非防禦型大型股。反之，「風險規避」（Risk-Off）狀態下，資金則撤回債券、黃金等避險資產。
